description: Public-information graphic in vertical/square format. The background is a bright photograph of a home interior during a move: a large open cardboard box in the lower-left foreground printed with a dark moving-truck icon, additional stacked boxes and a wicker basket in the mid-ground, a sunlit window behind, and a wood floor. Overlaid text at top reads 'Have you moved?' in large red type, followed by 'You must notify USCIS of your new address within 10 days.' in blue type. The lower-right shows the U.S. Department of Homeland Security circular seal next to the 'U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services' wordmark in blue. The tweet text states that changing your address with USPS will not update it with USCIS and references penalties.
notable_text: Have you moved? You must notify USCIS of your new address within 10 days.
